Description: The AMS1117 is a series of three-terminal, positive, low-dropout linear voltage regulators capable of delivering up to 1A of output current. It is available in both adjustable and fixed output voltage versions (1.5V, 1.8V, 2.5V, 2.85V, 3.3V, 5.0V). The device is designed to operate with a very low input-to-output voltage differential, featuring a guaranteed maximum dropout voltage of 1.3V at full load, which decreases at lower currents. It includes on-chip trimming for accurate reference voltage and built-in current limiting for overload protection.

Functions.FunctionDescription: For fixed-voltage versions, this pin is ground (GND). For adjustable versions, this pin is the adjust (ADJ) input for setting the output voltage via an external resistor divider.
